per_criterion_scores.internal_note: Commands were generally clear but lacked specificity in some areas, particularly regarding renovation cost data.
Feedback was integrated to some extent, but not all suggestions were detailed enough to improve the output significantly.
There was some improvement, but it was not comprehensive due to remaining issues with renovation costs and scenario detailing.

justification: The student demonstrated partial understanding with generally clear commands and some feedback integration, but lacked specificity and comprehensive improvement.
